result.text:
🚨NFT EDUCATION WITH 10 [MDEGEN]
• Like • Retweet • Bookmark • Share don’t hoard. 

•• Now that the market is little bit down on NFTs since over the weekend, this is the best time to start selecting your possible picks for your secondary play. 

*How do you do that without tools, you might ask? 

1. Well head to the nft market place for your most preferred chain (naturally not all chains are doing well on NFTs) - @MagicEden | @joepegsnft | @rarible etc

2. Set the market duration to 7 days (logically, since you’re starting off with a new week this should be your approach)

3. Make a list of all the projects that had some pump (it doesn’t matter the %)

4. Make a list of all the projects that had some dump (anything more than 30% is a no-no.. except you have more time on your hands then you can go for 45% least)

5. Make your research on the topics/industry inclined to the project 

6. Who has been talking about it in the last 7 days (their track record matter 100%)

7. How active the socials are (including telegram & discord — most times I don’t go this far except the chart is very bad but I like the vision of the project then I do into TG & DC)

8. Scale your capital for risk (in the case that it dumps more and how much you think you can hold off for depending on your intended achievement for playing)

These are a just a few tips to help with your experience. I’ll do more writing soon.

Love.
